title: Pasta Primavera with Roasted Vegetables
description: A colorful and flavorful spring-inspired pasta dish loaded with roasted vegetables and tossed in a light sauce.

ingredients.name: Roasted Vegetables (bell peppers, zucchini, cherry tomatoes)

instructions: Toss the cubed bread with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet and roast for 5-7 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high. Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the roasted vegetables to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked farfalle pasta to the skillet and toss with the vegetables and garlic.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a serving dish and top with roasted bread and basil.
